news.title: Juries Take the Lead in the Push for Child Online Safety
news.snippet: A pair of verdicts held social media companies accountable for harming young users, highlighting a growing backlash as Congress struggles to pass legislation.

news.title: Snapchat Investigated in Europe Over Child Safety Policies
news.snippet: Regulators in Brussels accused the social media platform of maintaining a weak age-verification system, and steering younger users toward inappropriate experiences.

news.title: Meta Lays Off 700 Employees, While Rewarding Top Executives
news.snippet: The jobs cuts and a new stock program for executives come as Meta continues to shift its focus to artificial intelligence.

news.title: Leonid Radvinsky, 43, Dies; Built the Adult-Entertainment Giant OnlyFans
news.snippet: By leveraging social media and the influencer economy, he turned his website into a byword for online pornography in the 21st century.

news.title: Why the Verdict Against Meta and YouTube Could Change Social Media
news.snippet: In a landmark case, a jury found Meta and YouTube guilty of creating products that were addictive. Ryan Mac explains the outcome and what it could mean for tech companies going forward.

news.title: Judge Stays Pentagon’s Labeling of Anthropic as ‘Supply Chain Risk’
news.snippet: The decision is an early victory for the artificial intelligence company in a rancorous legal battle with the Department of Defense.

news.title: Safety Experts Considered LaGuardia Challenging but Not an Outlier
news.snippet: Regulators, pilots and others in aviation have worried about the kind of runway accident that happened at LaGuardia Airport on Sunday.

news.title: The Clues Binance Missed That Led to Billions in Crypto Flowing to Iran
news.snippet: The world’s largest crypto exchange is under fire after investigators found accounts moving $1.7 billion to entities linked to Iran. Clues about those accounts were in plain sight for over a year.

news.title: Shield AI, a Start-Up Making Military Drones, Raises $2 Billion
news.snippet: The company, which develops autonomous military technology, also plans to buy a maker of simulation software as interest in next-generation defense soars.

news.title: In ‘The AI Doc,’ Sam Altman and Dario Amodei Go on the Record
news.snippet: “The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist” tries to cover so much that it ends up being more confusing than clarifying, but parts are fascinating.

news.title: OpenAI Is Shutting Down Sora, Its A.I. Video Generator
news.snippet: The start-up said it would discontinue Sora just three months after signing a multiyear deal to bring Disney characters to the service.

news.title: Epic Games Lays Off Over 1,000 Employees, Citing Fortnite Slump
news.snippet: The cut represents about 20 percent of the video game company’s work force, a spokeswoman said.

news.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
news.snippet: US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

news.title: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
news.snippet: A woman has been awarded $6m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

news.title: Parents should monitor children '24/7' on Roblox, says developer
news.snippet: Roblox said safety was a top priority and it had advanced safeguards in place to keep users safe.

news.title: OpenAI closes Sora video-making app and cancels $1bn Disney deal
news.snippet: The move comes less two years after the launch of the AI video app sent shockwaves through the media industry.

news.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
news.snippet: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Artificial intelligence is already in use in many areas of healthcare.

news.title: Anthropic Supply-Chain-Risk Designation Halted by Judge
news.snippet: A judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration’s designation, clearing the way for Anthropic to keep doing business without the label starting next week.

news.title: How Trump’s Plot to Grab Iran's Nuclear Fuel Would Actually Work
news.snippet: Experts say that an American ground operation targeting nuclear sites in Iran would be incredibly complicated, put troops’ lives at great risk—and might still fail.

news.title: Meet the Tech Reporters Using AI to Help Write and Edit Their Stories
news.snippet: Independent writers are using AI agents all throughout their reporting process. What’s the value of a human journalist, anyway?

news.title: The Sony Afeela Was Doomed to Fail
news.snippet: A six-year EV rollout ends with a thud.

news.title: Using a VPN May Subject You to NSA Spying
news.snippet: US lawmakers are pressing Tulsi Gabbard to reveal whether using a VPN can strip Americans of their constitutional protections against warrantless surveillance.

news.title: How to Buy Ethical and Eco-Friendly Electronics (2026)
news.snippet: Electronic waste, conflict minerals, and poor labor conditions are just a few issues blighting the tech industry. Here’s how to shop more sustainably.

news.title: David Sacks is done as AI czar — here’s what he’s doing instead
news.snippet: Sacks will be much further from power center in Washington than since the outset of this second Trump administration.

news.title: Anthropic wins injunction against Trump administration over Defense Department saga
news.snippet: A federal judge has ordered that the Trump administration rescind recent restrictions it placed on the AI company.

news.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
news.snippet: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

news.title: Mastodon is making its decentralized social network easier to use with its latest revamp
news.snippet: Mastodon is redesigning user profiles to simplify the experience and better appeal to mainstream users and organizations.

news.title: Netflix confirms it’s raising prices again
news.snippet: The standard plan without ads now costs $19.99 per month, a $2 increase from the previous $17.99 subscription fee, while the premium plan is also going up by $2 and will now cost $26.99 per month.

news.title: 16 of the most interesting startups from YC W26 Demo Day
news.snippet: From redirecting doomscrolling to training humanoid robots, these 16 startups stood out as the most interesting ones from an overflowing YC cohort.

news.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
news.snippet: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

news.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
news.snippet: Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

news.title: Defense startup Shield AI lands $12.7B valuation, up 140%, after US Air Force deal
news.snippet: In one year, Shield AI's value has leaped 140%. This after it won a contract to be the software provider to Anduril's Fury fighter jet for the U.S. Air Force.

news.title: Silicon Valley’s two biggest dramas have intersected: LiteLLM and Delve
news.snippet: LiteLLM offers an AI open source project used by millions that was infected by credential harvesting malware.

news.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
news.snippet: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

news.title: 智能庭院机器人Yarbo获近2亿元融资，新品众筹首发6小时破150万美金｜硬氪首发
news.snippet:
作者｜黄楠
  编辑｜袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，智能庭院机器人品牌汉阳科技Yarbo已完成近2亿元新一轮融资。本轮融资由松禾资本、温润投资（温氏股份旗下）、安乃达、芯联资本、龙华资本投资，涵盖了头部财务投资机构、上市公司产业资本与地方政府引导基金。融资资金将主要用于深化技术研发、加速产品迭代及拓展全球市场渠道。庚辛资本担任长期财务顾问。
  产业资本的注

news.title: 云鲸联创吴一昊Hower即将离职创业 | 硬氪独家
news.snippet:
作者 | 黄楠 袁斯来
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  近日，硬氪通过多个渠道独家获悉，云鲸联合创始人吴一昊（Hower）即将从公司离职。根据硬氪了解， Hower即将创业，但产品本身还在高度保密阶段。
  硬氪就此向吴一昊本人求证，对方证实消息属实；吴一昊表示，近期他将卸任管理职务、并准备创业，但仍保留云鲸首席战略顾问一职。
  吴一昊与云

news.title: 速腾聚创首次实现单季盈利，2025年机器人产品销量激增25倍｜最前线
news.snippet:
作者｜黄楠
  编辑｜袁斯来
  3月25日，速腾聚创（02498.HK）公布2025年第四季度及全年业绩报告。
  财报显示，2025年全年，速腾聚创实现营收约19.41亿元，激光雷达总销量约91.2万台，毛利约5.14亿元，同比增长81.3%。第四季度表现尤为突出，单季度实现经营利润1.30亿元，净利润1.04亿元，首次实现单季度盈利。第四季度综

news.title: 36氪官方Skill上线ClawHub，解锁OpenClaw新技能
news.snippet:
36氪已正式入驻ClawHub平台，重磅推出三款官方Skill，专为OpenClaw用户打造，无需繁琐操作，一键安装即可让你的OpenClaw升级为新经济信息中枢，轻松抢占信息先机。
  OpenClaw的强大，源于其可无限扩展的Skill生态——这些“技能包”就像给AI助手装上了专属外挂，让原本强大的智能体拥有更精准、更高效的专项能力。而ClawHub作为OpenClaw官方

news.title: 王兴：将争取把美团App率先升级成AI-powered App
news.snippet: 3月26日美团财报电话会上，CEO王兴表示：“我们将AI视为一个战略机遇，用以改善、强化，乃至彻底革新我们在本地生活核心业务上的产品与运营……我们将争取把美团App率先升级成AI-powered App，更好地满足消费者本地生活、即时零售端到端的完整体验。”雷峰网

news.title: 当小米不再需要"奇迹"
news.snippet: 短短一周不到的时间，小米做出了两件瞩目的大事。首先，小米发布了新一代小米SU7，在配置全面提升后，新一代SU7标准版21.99万元，Pro版24.99万元，Max版30.39万元，全系相比老款涨价4000元。价格虽然有所上涨，但新小米SU7仍在开售34分钟锁单突破1.5万、开售3天锁单超过3万。这对于习惯了“卷”字当先的汽车行业来说，这是一件让人很难相信的事实。其

news.title: 蚂蚁数科中关村论坛发声：Token效能将是衡量企业级AI价值的核心指标
news.snippet: 以OpenClaw为代表的自主执行智能体爆火，标志着AI应用已从“对话交互”向“任务执行”加速演进。企业在加速拥抱的同时，也面临着算力浪费、安全合规等多重挑战。如何让智能体真正实现规模化、可持续地落地，成为产业界共同关注的核心议题。3月26日，在中关村论坛未来产业创新发展论坛中，蚂蚁数科大模型技术创新部总经理章鹏在演讲中表示，OpenClaw的爆发将带来企业级AI范式革命，推动

news.title: AI时代需要什么样的VPU？
news.snippet: 当视频成为AI系统中的主要数据形态，视频处理也在被重新定义。一方面，视频分辨率持续提升，从4K走向8K，多路视频流成为常态；另一方面，视频不再只是“被观看”，而是被用于分析、决策甚至训练模型。这使得视频处理不再只是简单的编解码问题，而是同时涉及性能、

news.title: 单机架性能超x86两倍、每GW省100亿美元，Arm为智能体时代「重造」CPU
news.snippet: AI正在重塑全球计算基础设施，代理式计算正成为下一代算力革命的核心引擎，产业迫切需要更高效、更具能效比、更易规模化落地的原生部署方案。站在这一关键节点，Arm以全新姿态正式入场。当地时间2026年3月24日，Arm宣告推出自研Arm AGI CPU，卡位AI数据中心赛道，瞄准爆发式增长的代理式AI （agentic AI）工作负载

news.title: 速卖通英国站爆发：李宁大涨300%，亚马逊消费者转向速卖通
news.snippet: 速卖通AliExpress英国站周年庆大促中，品牌商家迎来集体爆发。其中，国潮代表李宁表现最为抢眼，在速卖通“超级品牌出海计划”加持下，单日成交额环比日销增长超过300%，冲上鞋服类目Top1。除国潮服饰外，速卖通多个类目在英国也增速惊人：中国智能清洁电器品牌Lubluelu销量翻41倍，验证了“海外托管”模式对家电品类的巨大推动力；泡泡玛特盲盒销量翻13倍，去年速卖通直播间二

news.title: 傲意科技完成C1轮1.5亿元融资
news.snippet: 上海傲意信息科技有限公司（以下简称"傲意科技"）今日宣布完成C1轮融资，本轮融资由中金资本旗下深圳市脑科学与类脑智能产业投资基金（以下简称"中金脑科学基金"）领投，多家老股东持续跟投。傲意科技系中金脑科学基金首家投资企业，据悉，傲意科技曾于2023年、2025年先后获得来自三博脑科集团

news.title: Quest Mobile：闲鱼活跃用户数首次超过小红书
news.snippet: 第三方数据机构QuestMobile数据显示，3月以来，闲鱼活跃用户数首次并连续两周超过小红书。3月份闲鱼活跃用户数增幅明显，排名互联网行业第一。此前，闲鱼上线了 AI相机新功能，极大降低了用户参与闲置发布、交易的门槛，带来开年后用户活跃度的强劲增长。雷峰网

news.title: 乐鑫发布双核 RISC-V 高性能 AIoT SoC 芯片 ESP32-S31，支持多协议连接
news.snippet: IT之家 3 月 27 日消息，乐鑫 Espressif 昨日宣布推出高性能 AIoT SoC 芯片 ESP32-S31，其采用双核 32-bit RISC-V CPU 设计，主频可达 320MHz，集成全面多协议连接。ESP32-S31 支持 2.4GHz 频段的 Wi-Fi 6、蓝牙 5.4（含 LE 与传统）、IEEE 802.15.4

news.title: 快手最后的筹码：260亿的豪赌
news.snippet: 这是快手为2026年设定的资本支出预算。相比2025年，这笔开支陡增了110亿元，且几乎全部定向砸向可灵大模型与AI基础设施。

news.title: 首次全年盈利的禾赛，为何盯上了物理 AI？
news.snippet: 禾赛正试图重新定义自己的角色。

news.title: GitHub修改Copilot隐私政策：4月24日起默认使用用户交互数据训练AI​
news.snippet: 如果用户在私有仓库中激活并使用Copilot，其在实时交互过程中产生的代码片段和上下文，将被视为交互数据，纳入采集与训练的范畴。

news.snippet: 两类软件最先受到冲击。
